examples: What right had the crowd to revile the players for something they could not help?
Will the foe revile your name forever?
The tramp revile the man who drive him off.
The workforce associated with what a generation of Americans were encouraged to revile as the "military-industrial complex" has contracted dramatically.
If you dislike Mr Djukanovic's lot, but still revile the old pals of Mr Milosevic who make up the main opposition, where can you go?
